name: UniProt
author: fzlzjerry
description: UniProt REST API over MCP: search UniProtKB, fetch entries and FASTA, map identifiers between databases, resolve taxonomy, and search UniRef clusters and proteomes.

tools.name: search_uniprotkb
tools.description: Search UniProtKB and return matching protein entries.

query.description: UniProtKB query in native syntax, e.g. 'gene:BRCA1' or 'keyword:Kinase AND length:[300 TO 500]'.

reviewed.description: True = Swiss-Prot (reviewed) only; False = TrEMBL only; omit = both.

organism_id.description: NCBI taxonomy id filter, e.g. 9606 for human.

format.description: 'summary' = compact per-entry digest; 'fasta' = raw sequences; 'tsv' = tab-separated table.

tools.name: get_entry
tools.description: Fetch one UniProtKB entry by accession.

format.description: 'summary' = curated digest; 'json' = full record; 'fasta' = sequence; 'txt' = flat file; 'gff' = features.

tools.name: get_fasta
tools.description: Return raw FASTA sequence(s) for one or more UniProtKB accessions.

accessions.description: One accession (string) or several (list of strings), e.g. ['P38398', 'P04637'].

tools.name: map_ids
tools.description: Map identifiers between databases via UniProt's async ID-mapping service.

from_db.description: Source database id, e.g. 'UniProtKB_AC-ID', 'Gene_Name', 'RefSeq_Protein', 'Ensembl', 'PDB', 'GeneID', 'KEGG'. An invalid value returns the full allowed list.

tools.name: get_taxonomy
tools.description: Resolve a taxonomy name or id to UniProt taxonomy records.

query_or_id.description: An organism name ('Homo sapiens', 'human', 'E. coli') or a numeric NCBI taxon id ('9606').

tools.name: search_uniref
tools.description: Search UniRef clusters (sequence-similarity clusters of UniProt proteins).

tools.name: search_proteomes
tools.description: Search UniProt proteomes (the protein set of an organism's genome).

query.description: Free-text proteome query, e.g. 'Escherichia coli'. May be omitted if organism_id is set.

organism_id.description: NCBI taxonomy id filter, e.g. 9606 for human.

reference_only.description: Only reference proteomes (one high-quality proteome per species group).

resources.name: UniProt query cheat-sheet
resources.description: Reference for UniProtKB query syntax (fields, operators, ranges, examples).
